title: Password-Protect Cloudways Alias URL on Production
description:
The Cloudways production server has a default alias URL that cannot be deleted. To prevent bots and unauthorized access through this URL, add HTTP Basic Authentication via .htaccess when the request comes through the Cloudways domain.

### Implementation
Use .htaccess with `RewriteCond` to detect requests via the Cloudways hostname and enforce `AuthType Basic` with an `.htpasswd` file. The password restriction only applies to the Cloudways domain; the production domain (app.datatoolspro.com) is unaffected.
acceptance_criteria: Requests via the Cloudways alias URL require HTTP Basic Authentication
Requests via the production domain are not affected
Bots cannot proceed past the auth prompt on the Cloudways URL
implementation_notes: Uses .htaccess with RewriteCond to detect the Cloudways hostname and enforce BasicAuth. The .htpasswd file is stored outside the web root.
